codeReview.summary: The feature commit only adds regression coverage, but that coverage targets the existing canonical returned-task implementation in useUserStore/reviewTaskFilters and verifies the required snake_case websocket normalization before list membership checks. The reviewed tests materially support VAL-FUP-RETURN-001, VAL-FUP-RT-001, and the store/filter side of VAL-FUP-CROSS-001 without introducing incorrect assertions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The designer-tracking-worker skill still mandates manual agent-browser verification for every feature, but this feature was a test-only contract-foundation change and the worker reasonably completed it with automated evidence only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step 6 in /Volumes/DPC/work/plant-code/plant3d-web/.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md requires agent-browser verification, while the transcript for workerSessionId 4bf48383-0102-4160-b764-659d898a595b shows only test-file edits and handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false specifically because browser validation was skipped for this non-UI change.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and relevant source files. The implementation is a test-only foundation pass that correctly locks in the existing canonical returned/resubmittable contract and websocket normalization behavior, so this feature review passes.
